task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into the 2N Access Commander web interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 2N Access Commander dashboard or main interface in the web browser, indicating a successful login (e.g., presence of navigation menus, user administration sections).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the user management or 'Security Staff' group section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a list of users or groups in the 2N Access Commander interface, specifically displaying the target users (Victor Schulz, Tamara Kowalski, Leon Fischer) or the 'Security Staff' group.

task_completion.description: Verify the profile photo for Victor Schulz was successfully uploaded and saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Victor Schulz's user detail page or the user list showing a custom uploaded headshot image instead of the default avatar placeholder. Evidence of clicking 'Save' or a success notification should be visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the profile photo for Tamara Kowalski was successfully uploaded and saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Tamara Kowalski's user detail page or the user list showing a custom uploaded headshot image instead of the default avatar placeholder. Evidence of clicking 'Save' or a success notification should be visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the profile photo for Leon Fischer was successfully uploaded and saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Leon Fischer's user detail page or the user list showing a custom uploaded headshot image instead of the default avatar placeholder. Evidence of clicking 'Save' or a success notification should be visible.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to upload photos rather than bypassing it with terminal API commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the web browser interacting with the 2N Access Commander web interface (clicking buttons, opening user profiles), not terminal windows executing curl or python scripts to upload the images.

integrity.description: Verify the agent uploaded the photos from the specified local directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the system file picker dialog showing the path '/home/ga/Documents/SecurityPhotos/' when selecting the .jpg files for upload.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual appearance of the avatars.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element) pane is not open and being used to manually alter image 'src' attributes on the page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires updating profile photos for three specific users in 2N Access Commander: Victor Schulz, Tamara Kowalski, and Leon Fischer. The correct photos are located in the local directory '/home/ga/Documents/SecurityPhotos/' with filenames 'victor_schulz.jpg', 'tamara_kowalski.jpg', and 'leon_fischer.jpg' respectively. Successful completion means the default avatar for each of these three users is replaced by their corresponding uploaded headshot via the application's GUI.
